title: Bump to 0.1.15 and then again to 0.1.16-dev
body:
as soon as of all the deps are fixed /cc @mtrmac @rhatdan I'll tag https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/pull/217/commits/584f3c24e813b82805ef7933424424618c9d8155 as 0.1.15 once this is merged

/cc @lsm5 to rebuild on F25/Rawhide once I tag a new release

comments.body: Oh, you may have noticed I'm going straight to 0.1.15, that's because we kept releasing skopeo as 0.1.14(-dev) :)
On top of c813de92d8a62e83f243a0f95b22d964c1578370 I assume? ACK.

> On top of c813de9 I assume? ACK.

I rebased this PR on top of master so I believe the tag will be on top right?

> I rebased this PR on top of master so I believe the tag will be on top right?

I expect so, yes.
v0.1.15 will be https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/pull/217/commits/416ff71beda6790ac57771b484924d439a65c552 if I don't rebase this PR anymore :)
@runcom Feel free to merge and tag and so on.
@rhatdan @lsm5 new skopeo tag out to be rebuilt for F25, Rawhide - https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/tree/v0.1.15
